About Us

THE CLUB

KINKER is more than a nightclub — it's a cultural institution dedicated to preserving and promoting underground techno culture in Basel. Our mission is to create a space where music, community, and freedom intersect.

Opening Hours

Tuesday

23:00 - 06:00

Techno Tuesday

Friday

23:00 - 08:00

Weekend Kick-off

Saturday

23:00 - 08:00

Main Event Night

Our Values

SAFE SPACE

We are committed to providing a safe environment for everyone. Harassment of any kind is not tolerated.

NO DISCRIMINATION

Everyone is welcome regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, or background.

RESPECT & CONSENT

Respect personal boundaries. Consent is mandatory. Look out for each other.

UNDERGROUND CULTURE

We preserve the spirit of underground techno - authentic, raw, and community-driven.

Entry Rules

  • Age 20+
  • Valid ID required
  • No photo/video policy
  • Respect the space & each other
  • Zero tolerance for discrimination

Important Notice

We reserve the right to refuse entry to anyone who does not respect our values or follows our rules. Our door selection is in place to maintain the atmosphere and safety of our space. Dress appropriately for an underground techno club.

Zero Tolerance Policy: Any form of discrimination, harassment, or aggressive behavior will result in immediate removal from the venue.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the age limit?

You must be 20 years or older to enter. Valid ID (passport, ID card, or driver's license) is required at the door.

Can I take photos or videos?

No. We have a strict no-photo and no-video policy to protect the privacy and freedom of our guests. Phones must be kept in your pocket.

Is there a dress code?

No formal dress code, but we encourage dark, expressive styles that fit the techno culture. Wear what makes you comfortable for dancing all night.

Do you have a cloakroom?

Yes, we have a supervised cloakroom. Price is CHF 5 per item.

Can I pay by card?

Yes, we accept both cash and cards at the bar and entrance.

Is the venue wheelchair accessible?

Unfortunately, due to the building's industrial heritage, the venue is not fully wheelchair accessible. Please contact us in advance for assistance.

KINKER.

Hard techno in Basel. No racism. No hate. Just music.
